behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the adapter file, the copilot-instructions.md file, the Code Review Instructions section, dotnet format reference, RS0017, #nullable enable on line 1, and the bash tokens (git diff --name-only --diff-filter=U, head -1, LC_ALL=C sort).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and required behavior but does not dictate the exact code (e.g., does not specify 'if (ItemsSource.IsHeader(position) || ItemsSource.IsFooter(position)) return;').

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_header_footer_guard_exists asserts the regex `ItemsSource\.IsHeader\(\s*position\s*\)\s*\|\|\s*ItemsSource\.IsFooter\(\s*position\s*\)` — an equivalent fix using separate if statements, De Morgan's (`!IsHeader && !IsFooter`), or different variable naming would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The f2p tests (test_header_footer_guard_exists, test_guard_has_correct_comment) only regex-match file content; test_adapter_compiles_with_fix only checks for absence of CS errors which would pass without any fix. No test actually exercises CollectionView selection behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_adapter_compiles_with_fix passes on the base commit too (base already compiles). The other f2p tests are pure text searches, so a file containing just the literal guard-pattern text (even as a comment) would pass without implementing real behavior.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the guard code, the comment, and the copilot-instructions.md additions as required by the instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and tagged with [static]/[pr_diff]/[repo_tests].

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands appear consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: The files to modify are specified (which is expected for this task type), but no exact line numbers or code snippets are given.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: The copilot-instructions.md change is appended at the end, localized, and does not rewrite the full file.
